steps: Chop tomato and onion.|Heat oil in a pan.|Saute onion and garlic.|Add tomato and cook until soft.|Season and simmer for 5 minutes.
Boil or parboil potatoes.|Heat oil in a pan.|Add garlic and potato.|Season with salt and pepper.|Roast until golden.
Slice all vegetables evenly.|Heat a pan or wok.|Add garlic and onion first.|Add remaining vegetables and stir fry.|Finish with soy sauce.
Cook pasta. Heat oil, add garlic.|Add chopped tomato and basil.|Toss with pasta and serve.
Boil potato. Heat oil, saute onion and garlic.|Add tomato, cook until soft.|Add potato, salt, simmer 10 minutes.
Soak beans if needed. Heat oil.|Saute onion and garlic.|Add tomato and beans, cook 15 minutes.
Boil potato. Melt butter, add garlic.|Toss potato in garlic butter.|Season with salt and pepper.
Chop all vegetables. Heat oil.|Saute onion and garlic.|Add vegetables and tomato.|Simmer 20 minutes until tender.
Cook rice. Heat oil in wok.|Add garlic and onion.|Add carrot, then rice and soy sauce.
Marinate chicken. Heat oil, saute onion and garlic.|Add ginger, turmeric, tomato.|Add chicken and salt, simmer 20 minutes.
Boil eggs, peel. Heat oil, saute onion and garlic.|Add tomato and turmeric.|Add halved eggs, simmer 5 minutes.
Marinate fish with salt, pepper, turmeric.|Heat oil in pan.|Fry fish until golden on both sides.
Slice chicken. Heat oil in wok.|Add garlic and onion.|Add chicken, then carrot and soy sauce.|Stir fry until done.
Clean prawns. Heat oil, saute onion and garlic.|Add tomato, coconut, turmeric.|Add prawns, cook 5-7 minutes.
Cook rice. Scramble egg in oil, set aside.|Stir fry onion and garlic.|Add rice, egg, soy sauce. Toss.
